Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Belarus.notes: Visas are issued on arrival at the Minsk International Airport if the support documents were submitted not later than 3 business days before expected date of arrival..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate..

Bhutan.notes: Visa fee is USD 40 per person and visa application may be processed within 5 business days with duration of stay of 90 days.. e-Visa applicant is also subject to pay Sustainable Development Fee.

Cape Verde.notes: Not available at all entry points..

Colombia.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period.

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Equatorial Guinea.notes: must arrive via Malabo International Airport.

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Ethiopia.notes: eVisa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

France and territories.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Gabon.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Guyana.notes: Exempt from obtaining a visa for stays of up to 90 days if they hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state.

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Jordan.notes: Conditions apply.. Not available at all entry points..

Kazakhstan.notes: Must arrive via Nursultan Nazarbayev International Airport or Almaty International Airport.

Kiribati.notes: May not exceed 90 days within any 12-month period.

Kyrgyzstan.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk )..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Mexico.notes: Visa not required for holders of valid visa or permanent residence issued by the U.S., Canada, Japan, United Kingdom, Colombia, Chile, or Schengen area.. 7 days with Tarjeta de Visitante Regional (TVR) issued at Official Border Crossings, allows entry into the four Southern States..

Myanmar.notes: eVisa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. eVisa is available for tourism only..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

New Zealand.notes: Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Pakistan.notes: Online Visa eligible.. Electronic Travel Authorization to obtain a visa on arrival for business purposes..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Serbia.notes: May enter if holding a USA Green Card.

Seychelles.notes: Extendable up to a year with fee.

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Timor-Leste.notes: Not available at all entry points..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry. May apply online..

Ukraine.notes: e-Visa is currently suspended due to Russian invasion of Ukraine..

Zimbabwe.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days.

Eritrea outside Asmara.notes: Travel Permit for Foreigners is required to travel outside of the capital..

Ascension Island.notes: 3 months within any one year period.

Tristan da Cunha.notes: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island. 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands..

Somaliland.notes: Obtainable on arrival or at the Somaliland Mission in Alexandria, VA..

Sudan outside Khartoum.notes: All foreigners traveling more than 25 km (16 mi) outside of Khartoum must obtain a travel permit..

Protected and restricted areas of India.notes: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh.. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim.. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year..

Baikonur & Priozersk.notes: Special permission required for the city of Baikonur and surrounding areas in Kyzylorda Oblast, and the town of Priozersk near Almaty..

Kish Island.notes: Tourists for Kish Island do not require a visa. [ citation needed ].

Sabah and Sarawak.notes: These states have their own immigration authorities and passport is required to travel to them, however the same visa applies. [ citation needed ].

Maldives outside Malé.notes: Tourists are generally prohibited from visiting non-resort islands without the express permission of the Government of the Maldives. [ citation needed ].

Palestine.notes: Travel to Gaza Strip may be restricted..

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.notes: OIVR permit required. Special permit required for Lake Sarez..

Tibet Autonomous Region.notes: Tibet Travel Permit required in addision to Chinese visa..

Closed cities of Turkmenistan.notes: A special permit, issued prior to arrival by Ministry of Foreign Affairs, is required if visiting the following places: Atamurat, Cheleken, Dashoguz, Serakhs and Serhetabat..

Yemen outside Sanaa or Aden.notes: Special permission needed for travel outside Sanaa or Aden. [ citation needed ].

Curaçao.notes: Maximum consecutive period of three months every six months..

Sint Maarten.notes: Maximum stay allowed is 3 months uninterrupted with the possibility to extend.

Brest and Grodno.requirement: Visa not required [ may be outdated as of February 2022 ]

Jan Mayen.notes: Permit issued by the local police required for stays less than 24 hours. Permit issued by the Norwegian police required for stays of more than 24 hours..

Closed cities of Russia.notes: Several closed cities and regions in Russia require special authorization. [ citation needed ].

South Ossetia.notes: Multiple entry visa to Russia and three-day prior notification are required to enter South Ossetia..

Svalbard.notes: Any of any nationality may live and work freely in Svalbard per the Svalbard Treaty.

Galápagos.notes: Online pre-registration is required.. Transit Control Card must be obtained at the airport prior to departure..

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.notes: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling )..

Antarctica.notes: Special permits required for Bouvet Island, British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency.
